description: Custom telemetry collected by Intune Proactive Remediation scripts and ingested via the Logs Ingestion API.

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: Event timestamp (UTC). REQUIRED by Log Analytics. Set by the device script.

columns.name: IntuneScriptVersion
columns.description: Version of the Intune script that produced this record, so you can tell old data from the current script.

columns.name: BitLockerStatus
columns.description: Per-volume BitLocker protection/encryption status (array of objects from Get-BitLockerVolume).

columns.name: WindowsUpdateSettings
columns.description: Windows Update posture as a JSON object: co-management state (CoMgmtWorkload, CoMgmtValue) plus the WindowsUpdate and WindowsUpdate\AU policy registry values. Values are strings; an empty string means not configured.

columns.name: DiagnosticDataSettings
columns.description: Windows diagnostic data / telemetry policy as a JSON object: all configured values under the DataCollection policy key (e.g. AllowTelemetry_PolicyManager, AllowDeviceNameInTelemetry, LimitDiagnosticLogCollection, LimitDumpCollection). Values are strings.
